tests.scenario: Close a donation prompt and continue into the selected session
steps: Open the app while signed out or on a fresh install
Choose a session that triggers a donation prompt
Close the prompt using the dismiss option
tests.expected_result: The prompt closes and the same session is still available to start without payment or account creation.

tests.scenario: Dismiss a donation prompt while browsing
steps: Open the home screen and browse normally
Open a donation prompt from a browsing surface
Close the prompt
tests.expected_result: The user stays in the same browsing flow and can still start a session without paying.

tests.scenario: Browse the app without seeing ads
steps: Open the home screen
Spend about 15 minutes moving between the home screen, library, and one course page
Watch the interface while browsing
tests.expected_result: No third-party display, video, or audio ad appears while browsing.

tests.scenario: Start a session without a subscription gate
steps: Open any meditation or sleep session
Start playback
Continue through the first minute of playback
tests.expected_result: The session starts and continues without a subscription requirement appearing.

tests.scenario: Open the Sleep area
steps: Open the home screen
Go to the Sleep area
Look at the sections shown there
tests.expected_result: Sleep meditations, sleep stories, and sleep sounds appear as separate sections.

tests.scenario: Open each sleep section
steps: Open the Sleep area
Open sleep meditations and return
Open sleep stories and sleep sounds
tests.expected_result: Each section opens its own list of sleep-related content.

tests.scenario: Let one sleep track roll into the next
steps: Open any two sleep tracks
Add both tracks to the queue
Start the first track and let it finish
tests.expected_result: The second track starts automatically and no blocking popup interrupts playback.

tests.scenario: Repeat a sleep track without interruption
steps: Open one sleep track
Turn on repeat
Let the track play to the end
tests.expected_result: The same track starts again automatically and no blocking popup appears between repeats.

tests.scenario: Open the needs-based support area
steps: Open the browse or support area
Go to the section organized by needs or emotional states
Review the category labels
tests.expected_result: Anxiety, Stress, Panic, Grief, and Anger are all visible as separate categories.

tests.scenario: Open one support category
steps: Open the needs-based support area
Select the Panic category
Review the page that opens
tests.expected_result: A list of sessions for panic support is displayed.

tests.scenario: Save a session as a favorite
steps: Open any session detail page or player screen
Use the favorite control to save the session
Return to the home screen
tests.expected_result: The selected session is saved and appears in a favorites area accessible from the home screen.

tests.scenario: Start a saved favorite from home in two taps
steps: Make sure at least one session is already saved as a favorite
Open the home screen
Start that favorite using the controls shown there
tests.expected_result: The favorite session starts in two taps or fewer from the home screen.

tests.scenario: Beginner lessons stay in order
steps: Open the Beginner course
Review the first several lessons
Check the lesson sequence
tests.expected_result: The Beginner course displays its lessons in a fixed order.

tests.scenario: Return to the next unfinished beginner lesson
steps: Finish lesson 1 in the Beginner course
Leave the course screen
Open the Beginner course again
tests.expected_result: Lesson 1 is marked complete and lesson 2 is shown as the next lesson.

tests.scenario: Set one daily reminder
steps: Open reminder settings
Set the reminder time to 21:00 local time
Enable the reminder and save it
tests.expected_result: The selected time is saved and one daily reminder is scheduled for 21:00.

tests.scenario: Turn the daily reminder off
steps: Open reminder settings while a reminder is enabled
Turn the reminder off
Save or leave the settings screen
tests.expected_result: The reminder is shown as disabled and no active daily reminder remains scheduled.

tests.scenario: Keep playback going with the screen off
steps: Start any guided session
Connect wired or Bluetooth headphones
Turn the screen off and wait 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: The audio keeps playing for the full 10-minute window and the app does not crash.

tests.scenario: Return to the app after screen-off playback
steps: Start any guided session
Turn the screen off while keeping headphones connected
Reopen the app after 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: The session is still active and the playback controls still respond after reopening the app.

tests.scenario: See progress carry over to another device
steps: Sign in with the same account on device A and device B
Complete one course lesson on device A
Open the same course on device B and wait for sync
tests.expected_result: Within 60 seconds, device B shows the completed lesson and the updated streak count.

tests.scenario: Get progress back after signing in again
steps: Sign in to an account that already has a streak and completed lessons
Sign out and then sign back in with the same account
Open the progress or course screen and wait for sync
tests.expected_result: Within 60 seconds, the earlier streak count and completed lessons are restored.
